TOKYOSTAMP QUEST

Collect 10 sacred stamps across the city
A journey presented by K's House Tokyo Oasis

How to Play

0 / 10
あそびかた

A Stamp Pilgrimage
Across Tokyo

You're a guest at K's House Tokyo Oasis, setting out to explore the city. Tokyo's temples, shrines and famous corners each hold a sacred stamp (御朱印). Wander the real transit network, play a little game at every landmark, and collect all ten seals in your stamp book.

壱

Collect 10 stamps

Ten districts, ten stamps. Visit them in any order you like — there's no wrong path. Your stamp book fills up as you go, and your progress is saved on this device automatically.

弐

Ride the rails (and the buses)

On the transit map, tap any station connected to where you're standing. You'll pick how to get there — and pay the fare from your Suica IC card. Walking is always free, but much slower.

🚃 Train · ¥200 🚌 Bus · ¥120 🚶 Walk · Free
参

Win the landmark's game

Arrive at a district and a short mini-game awaits — matching, timing, a quick quiz, a little garden to arrange, and more. Clear it and the district's stamp is pressed into your book.

四

Mind your Suica balance

Each new stamp tops up your card by ¥450, so exploring keeps you funded. If you ever run low, don't worry — you can always walk to your next stop for free.

五

Earn the master seal

Once all ten stamps are collected, return to the hostel to receive the final golden seal that completes your Tokyo Stamp Quest.

The Tokyo Transit Quest

Ride the trains and buses freely — earn a stamp at all ten districts.

Tap any station connected to your current stop to travel there.
